sections.heading: Editorial independence
sections.body: TopTechReviews.org rankings reflect our weighted scoring rubric and hands-on evaluation methodology. Providers cannot pay for placement or ranking position in our comparison tables.

sections.heading: Affiliate relationships
sections.body: Some outbound links on this site are affiliate links. If you click a link and sign up for or purchase a product, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you. Affiliate relationships do not influence our scores or write-ups.

sections.heading: Partner properties
sections.body: We may publish extended reviews or product CTAs on partner properties (including ReferIQ) where noted. Managed SEO comparison content is canonical on TopTechReviews.org.

sections.heading: Sponsored placements
sections.body: Occasionally we display clearly labeled sponsored banners on category pages. Sponsored placements are paid advertising and do not affect our rankings or editorial scores.

sections.heading: Display advertising
sections.body: We may show third-party display advertisements on some pages. Advertisements are labeled and are separate from our editorial recommendations.
